description: Cross-sector baseline compliance controls for Ghana v1. Designed to be applied together with sector-specific overlays. Rules are evidence-driven and deterministic; absence of evidence does not by itself constitute legal non-compliance.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only baseline controls for document/document-set review.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Data Protection Act, 2012 (Act 843)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Data Protection Commission

primary_sources.name: Cybersecurity Act, 2020 (Act 1038)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Cyber Security Authority

primary_sources.name: Anti-Money Laundering Act, 2020 (Act 1044)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Financial Intelligence Centre

primary_sources.name: Right to Information Act, 2019 (Act 989)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Right to Information Commission

primary_sources.name: Companies Act, 2019 (Act 992)
primary_sources.issuer: Parliament of Ghana / Office of the Registrar of Companies

rules.title: Privacy notice or data protection disclosure evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document contains a privacy notice, privacy policy, data protection notice, or equivalent personal-data disclosure evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Personal-data processing purpose, consent, or lawful processing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks whether the document explains why personal data is collected, used, retained, disclosed, or processed.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Cybersecurity governance, incident, or access-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for cyber-risk governance, incident reporting, access control, secure systems, or cybersecurity policy evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: AML/CFT customer due diligence or suspicious transaction evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for customer due diligence, KYC, beneficial ownership, monitoring, or suspicious transaction reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Corporate registration, governance, or accounting-record evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for company registration, registrar evidence, directors, accounting records, or corporate governance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Public-sector information access or exemption-handling evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for RTI, public information access, information officer, records manual, or exempt-information handling evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, current-law status, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
